# Great Blue Heron

*Ardea herodias*

![A Great Blue Heron standing in shallow water](../../assets/great-blue-heron.png)

Tall, slate-grey wading bird; hunts by standing utterly still and striking.
Patient past the point most watchers are.

## Where seen

- [Cedar Marsh Boardwalk](../../trails/cedar-marsh.md), the far channel.

## On these walks

- [2026-05-09](../../daily/2026-05-09.md)
- [2026-06-01](../../daily/2026-06-01.md) — same channel; possibly nesting.
